channel.title: BF Security APIs on BF Website
channel.description: Recent content in BF Security APIs on BF Website

item.title: BF Security Rules API
item.description: BF Security Rules API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //Exclusive Rights Only// The BF Security Rules APP/API generates datasets of BF Improper States that should not be present at code execution to assure code safety. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFSecurityRules.xml https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFSecurityRules.json API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("user", YOUR_USER_NAME); client.

item.title: BF Security Rules CWE API
item.description: BF Security Rules CWE API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //Exclusive Rights Only// The BF Security Rules CWE APP/API generates datasets of BF Improper States by CWE (where applicable) that should not be present at code execution to assure code safety. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFSecurityRules.xml/CWE https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFSecurityRules.json/CWE Note: ID="-1" if no CWE corresponds to that BF Wwakness Triple. API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.
